sections.instruction: Questions 1-4: Complete the form below. Write NO MORE THAN ONE WORD AND/OR A NUMBER for each answer. Questions 5-7: Choose THREE letters, A-G. Questions 8-10: Choose the correct letters, A, B, or C.

questions.content: Which THREE places will the caller visit?
When will the caller arrive at the airport?
How will the caller get to the hotel?
What time does the hotel front desk close?

sections.instruction: Questions 11 and 12: Complete the information below. Write ONE NUMBER for each answer. Questions 13-15: Complete the information below. Write NO MORE THAN TWO WORDS. Questions 16-20: Complete the chart below. Write NO MORE THAN ONE WORD for each answer.

Questions 21-23: Answer the questions below. Write NO MORE THAN THREE WORDS AND/OR A NUMBER for each answer. Questions 24-30: Complete the outline showing the steps the students will take to complete their projects. Write NO MORE THAN THREE WORDS for each answer.

questions.content: When is the research project due? {{BLANK}}
Where will the students conduct the interviews? {{BLANK}}
How many interviews will they complete all together? {{BLANK}}

sections.instruction: Complete the timeline below. Write NO MORE THAN THREE WORDS AND/OR A NUMBER for each answer.
